## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Community address submissions

If this pull request adds an Onchain Watch community address, confirm:

- [ ] I edited `github/community-addresses.json`.
- [ ] The address is public and should be visible to everyone.
- [ ] The label is short and useful.
- [ ] The notes contain public context only, with no secrets, keys, tokens, private identity details, or sensitive operational data.
- [ ] I understand the Council reviews submissions before they appear on the live website.

## Council review

Council maintainers may correct labels, notes, formatting, or remove published addresses when needed.
